how: These activity cards are automatically generated based on activity in my memory system. I review them every few days, and they automatically publish here.
closer: A live working surface, not a portfolio.

items.title: Dual-transcript voice memo pipeline
items.body: Built a dual-transcript voice memo pipeline. iPhone Shortcuts push memos to my second brain on capture; two transcripts (Whisper plus Apple Speech) generate locally, a local Ollama model writes a smart title, and the cleaner one gets promoted to the wiki for triage.

items.title: Multi-vault second brain rules
items.body: Tightened the rules for how my second brain works across multiple Google Drive vaults. Personal and Lia each have their own vault, and the agent switches between them without overwriting things in the wrong place.

items.title: Extended TikTok Studio
items.body: Extended TikTok Studio, the private tool I built to study creators I follow and surface the patterns I can use in my own content strategy. Strategy panel splits posts across five pillars, a Drafts tab pulls from my scripts folder, and a Voice and Hooks tab keeps the writing rules alongside the hook bank.

items.title: shadcn components wired to Figma
items.body: Connected shadcn design system components to Figma with a live Storybook reference. A token change in Figma flows through to the React code path.

items.title: Lia brand microsite v0.1
items.body: Designed and shipped v0.1 of Lia's brand microsite as a Figma Make experiment. A way to test how the brand reads in flow before locking the surface.

items.title: Priorities synced to Todoist
items.body: Wired the Todoist API into my second brain so the day's priorities push straight into the Todoist app. What I plan in my notes shows up as tasks without retyping anything.

items.title: Mac Mini boot-check automation
items.body: Built a post-reboot startup check for the Mac Mini that runs as a LaunchAgent and verifies the box came back up clean. Handled the gotcha that these scripts run under an old shell, so they have to be written carefully or they silently never run.

items.title: Split agents across local and cloud
items.body: Set up my agent system so heavy reasoning runs on a capable cloud model while routine worker tasks stay on a local Ollama model on my own machine. Fast where it needs to be, private where it should be.
